rooms.title: Collapsed Test Wing

objects.text: A maintenance seal still answers your crest. You can stabilize your mana here.
Mira's ribbon is caught in the broken railing. She made it this far... and kept moving upward.
Residual magic hums in a looping rhythm. The labyrinth is listening to which spell you favor.

rooms.entry_text: The fall should have killed the exam. Instead, the labyrinth seals the breach and leaves one corridor lit above you.

rooms.title: Resonance Conduit

objects.text: Record fragment: 'Upper channel restoration initiated.' The same line repeats, but each glyph angles downward.

rooms.entry_text: The conduit answers your spells. Every surge that should lift rubble aside instead rotates the corridor below your feet.

rooms.title: Deep Alignment Gate

objects.text: Your own footsteps answer a fraction too late. The maze is rehearsing you.
A wall inscription stops mid-sentence: 'The path to the surface is now...' The last word is scratched into a spiral.

rooms.entry_text: The chamber claims to be an ascent lock. Yet the air grows colder, older, and far heavier than the floors above.

rooms.title: Sealed Vault Sector

objects.text: Containment seals line the walls in repeating sequences. Each one is signed with a different mage's crest.
A cracked slate reads: 'Third batch cleared. Fourth batch shows anomalous growth patterns.' The rest is burned away.
A faint ley-line thread remains active. Enough to recover your mana before the next seal.

rooms.entry_text: The vault doors were meant to keep something in. The lock mechanism on the inside tells you which side lost.

rooms.title: Arcane Core Chamber

objects.text: The air here bends the light wrong. Every syllable you speak arrives a half-second before you speak it.
A name is scratched into the wall, then crossed out. Beneath it: 'Do not remember this place.'
The core hums at a frequency that disagrees with your bones. You have heard this sound before, in dreams.
A fissure leaks raw mana. Old, pressurized, and entirely unsanctioned. It will serve.

rooms.entry_text: Something in this chamber already knows you are here. It has been counting your steps since the first floor.

rooms.title: Void Rift Passage

objects.text: The void does not destroy. It reassigns. Your spells leave marks here that persist after you are gone.
Dark resonance accumulates in sealed chambers. The walls have been learning what passes through them.

rooms.entry_text: The air here resists your presence. Whatever shaped this corridor did not account for you.
